overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character walking along a winding dirt path through rolling grasslands. The weather transitions from sunny to stormy overcast as the character approaches a wooden fence overlooking a distant valley.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland with winding dirt path

events.description: sky darkens dramatically as storm clouds roll in, shifting from sunny to overcast

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path through sunny grassland, wearing a blue shirt and brown vest

entered.detail: reddish-brown winding trail cutting through tall green grass
rolling green terrain with scattered wildflowers
cluster of mature oak trees on the horizon ahead

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a reddish dirt path through bright, sunlit grasslands. Rolling green hills extend to both sides while a cluster of oak trees marks the destination ahead under a partly cloudy blue sky.

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as storm clouds darken the sky and wind picks up

segments.scene_description: Under darkening storm clouds, the character continues walking as the distant trees grow closer. The lighting shifts to a moody, diffused gray as the weather changes, with the path remaining central through the tall grass.

events.description: wooden fence appears on the right side, marking the edge of the path and revealing a valley vista

agents.ego_description: walking past a wooden fence line while approaching a large oak tree, briefly raising hand to head

entered.detail: weathered wooden post-and-rail fence running parallel to the path
misty valley visible beyond the fence with low-lying fog

segments.scene_description: A wooden fence appears on the right, opening up a view of a misty valley below. The character continues toward a large oak tree now close ahead, walking along the fenced path under heavy storm clouds.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a winding dirt path as a bright, sunlit grassland transforms into a moody, storm-swept landscape. It begins with the character walking through vibrant green hills under a partly cloudy blue sky, heading toward a distant cluster of oak trees. As the character advances, the lighting shifts from brilliant gold to a diffused gray while heavy storm clouds gather and darken the horizon. The scene then opens up as a wooden fence appears on the right, revealing a misty valley below before the camera closes in on a large oak tree under the oppressive weight of the overcast sky.
